_comment: Shipped ImageStage preset for relighting via Flux-2 Klein 9B + Sun-direction LoRA. LoadImage #25 = subject (also drives output size via GetImageSize #18), LoadImage #30 ('光源加载') = lighting reference — typically the Relight node's '3d light' (light-ball render), but any image works. Both go through VAEEncode → chained ReferenceLatent conditioning. Prompt → positive CLIPTextEncode #16, negative → #2, seed → RandomNoise #22.
label: Flux2 Klein Relight
description: Relight via Flux-2 Klein 9B + Sun-direction LoRA (4-step). Wire your subject into images[0] and a LIGHTING REFERENCE into images[1] — e.g. the Relight node's 3d-light render, or any reference photo whose lighting you want to transfer. Output size follows the subject image.

image.error: Relight needs a subject image — wire one into the stage's first image slot.
Relight needs a lighting reference in the 2nd image slot — wire the Relight node's '3d light' output (or any image) into it.

text.default: match the sun direction from the reference
